text: Found a {water_item}. Current count: indeterminate. Packing it anyway.
Spotted medical supplies in a pouch labeled PROBABLY CLEAN.
An Anxietick {robot_flavor_anxietick}. Hid behind a crate. It made a thoughtful little lunge at ankle height.
An Anxietick {robot_flavor_anxietick}. Panicked, sprinted, and discovered three separate sharp edges personally.
An Anxietick {robot_flavor_anxietick}. Fled straight into a catastrophic workplace-safety incident.
A Tattletale drone {robot_flavor_tattletale}. Relocated at speed.
A Tattletale drone {robot_flavor_tattletale}. Its broadcast brought immediate and extremely persuasive consequences.
A Tattletale drone {robot_flavor_tattletale}. Entire zone joined the conversation. Medical review pending.
Roomba Prime {robot_flavor_roomba_prime}. Took significant damage avoiding it. The floor was very clean.
Roomba Prime {robot_flavor_roomba_prime}. It pursued with the confidence of a machine that has never known mercy.
Roomba Prime {robot_flavor_roomba_prime}. Initiated full clean-up cycle. Handler is advised to begin paperwork.
A Shredder Dedder {robot_flavor_shredder_dedder}. Everyone involved suddenly remembered they had somewhere else to be.
Found a locker and hid in it. A robot is also waiting outside. We're both very patient.
Met another raider. We emoted at each other for several minutes then both ran in opposite directions.
Formed a temporary alliance with another raider. We split up immediately. Classic.
Spotted a crate in the distance. It is definitely full of good things and not a robot.
Backpack is almost full. Found another crate. Reorganising to fit. Just one more.
